title: Normalize email validation
prompt: Fix is_valid_email so surrounding whitespace is ignored and domains are treated case-insensitively. Preserve the return type.
hidden_tests_description: Uppercase domains, missing local parts, multiple at-signs, and whitespace-only values are checked.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: No internal benchmark format is rewarded.
h0_risk_notes: A strong non-system baseline can plausibly match this task.
